sections.title: Talking to Abidor again after getting blessed

lines.speaker: Abidor Crank
lines.text: Ohhh, hello again... sorry my friend, but I have to get going.

lines.speaker: Abidor Crank
lines.text: Ahhh, hello there my friend. You look like you could do with some assistance.

lines.speaker: Abidor Crank
lines.text: Yes, of course... Here, prepare yourselves!

lines.speaker: Abidor Crank
lines.text: There you go... Right, I must be off now. Good luck with your travels.

sections.title: Kicking the player out of Morytania

lines.speaker: Abidor Crank
lines.text: Well, this is no good at all! You'll never survive in Morytania, you'll have to go back.
